title: Extra Secure Chat
description: (Mostly) Patches an exploit used by gaslight to generate fake reports
body:
Mostly patches the exploit used by gaslight by preventing sending messages to yourself, which prevents generating fake context. The exploit can still be used with multiple accounts however. There is a config option to convert all whispers to system messages to *also* prevent this, but it makes all whispers non-report-able so this isn't a recommended option.

Currently beta as I cant test this myself due to not owning 2 copies of the game, feel free to contact me on discord and tell me this works though and ill switch to release!
